name: Uncle Chuck Incorporated
short_description: Uncle Chuck Incorporated is a short animatronic survival horror game. Step into a funplex shrouded in mystery and suspense as you unravel the secrets behind the downfall of the legendary robotics entertainment company, Uncle Chuck Inc.
detailed_description:
About The Game

Welcome to Uncle Chuck Incorporated a dark animatronic survival horror game. Step into a world shrouded in mystery and suspense as you unravel the secrets behind the downfall of the legendary robotics entertainment company, Uncle Chuck Inc. Set in the eerie year of 2005, this adventure will take you deep into the heart of an abandoned funplex, where every shadow hides a secret, and every creak in the floorboard could mean danger.

Story

In 2005, the world was stunned when Uncle Chuck Inc.—a legendary robotics entertainment company known for its groundbreaking animatronics and beloved mascot characters—abruptly filed for bankruptcy and vanished from the public eye. Without explanation, the company recalled all its creations to a remote and heavily guarded headquarters deep upstate. Whispers of a hidden truth began to circulate—classified Info rumored to reveal the real reason behind the company’s mysterious downfall. Now, as a determined investigator, you’ve been tasked with breaking into the abandoned Uncle Chuck funplex arcade to uncover the secrets buried within. But you're not alone. The original animatronic Uncle Chuck is still operational, stalking the empty corridors, and it will stop at nothing to ensure the truth remains buried.

Gameplay

Your journey begins at the gates of Uncle Chuck Inc.'s deserted funplex. As you navigate through the dark, labyrinthine corridors, you'll need to solve intricate puzzles to unlock new areas of the building. Each solved puzzle brings you one step closer to the elusive Info. Along the way, you must manage your inventory wisely, balancing key items necessary for progression with health items that will keep you in the game. Stealth is your greatest ally; Uncle Chuck's animatronic presence is a constant threat. Move quietly, hide in the shadows, and outsmart this relentless guardian to survive. Every decision you make could mean the difference between uncovering the truth or becoming another forgotten casualty of Uncle Chuck Inc.

Features

  • Inventory management

  • In depth stealth mechanics

  • Intelligent enemy AI

  • Smart level progression

  • Fun puzzles

Conclusion

Are you ready to face the unknown and uncover the truth behind Uncle Chuck Inc.'s mysterious downfall? The abandoned funplex awaits, filled with secrets and dangers lurking in every corner. Sharpen your wits, manage your resources, and stay hidden to complete your mission. The truth is out there, hidden within the shadows of Uncle Chuck Incorporated. Will you emerge victorious, or will the animatronic guardian end your quest? The fate of the investigation lies in your hands.
